name: Web - Webshell Upload or Access Attempt
description: Detects webshell upload attempts and access to known webshell file patterns. Covers PHP, JSP, ASPX shells uploaded to common writable directories and access to files with shell-like naming conventions.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | eval uri_lower=lower(uri) | eval webshell_match=case( match(uri_lower, "\.(php|phtml|php5|php7|phar|shtml)$") AND match(uri_lower, "(shell|cmd|exec|c99|r57|b374k|wso|mini|bypass|hack|backdoor|eval|upload|file_manager)"), "Known webshell name", match(uri_lower, "/(uploads?|images?|img|media|files?|tmp|temp|cache|static|assets)/.*\.(php|phtml|php5)"), "PHP in upload directory", match(uri_lower, "/(uploads?|images?|img|media|files?|tmp)/.*\.(jsp|jspx|aspx|ashx|asmx)"), "Script in upload directory", method="POST" AND match(uri_lower, "\.(php|jsp|aspx)") AND match(uri_lower, "(upload|file|attach)"), "File upload to script", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(webshell_match) | stats count as access_count, values(webshell_match) as match_types, values(method) as methods, values(status) as statuses by src_ip, host, uri | eval severity="critical" | eval mitre="T1505.003" | sort -access_count | table src_ip, host, uri, access_count, match_types, methods, statuses, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
